text: Hello? Are you there? Hello? Hey, this is Sarah. There's a note on your Medicare profile that your 2026 update hasn't been confirmed. Just a quick confirmation from you and we're all set. Do you have Part A and Part B? So you do have Part A and B of Medicare, right?
